GitHub Actions workflow for running GitLint on pull requests to check commit message compliance.

# Purpose
This GitHub Actions workflow file automates compliance checks on pull requests. It triggers when a pull request is opened or updated. The workflow defines a job named `lint` that runs on an `ubuntu-24.04` environment. The job includes steps to check out the pull request's code, install the `gitlint` tool, and execute `gitlint` to lint commit messages between the base and head of the pull request.
